description: src/features/knowledge-engine's KPIs domain has no closed vocabulary (deliberately open — see knowledge-engine/README.md). The best existing canonical vocabulary to reuse here is instead features/business-dna's own fixed KPI enum. Source of truth: src/features/business-dna/types/sections/kpis.ts → BusinessDnaKpiKey (10 values). Distinct from business-library/schema.ts's legacy kpis section, which is an open-ended array, not a closed list — see features/business-dna/README.md's mapping table for why the two are kept separate concepts.
